docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,385.00 FILED BY REDEVELOPMENT AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT FRAZIER ALLEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FRAZIER ALLEN
